hero.title: Your rights, explained simply
hero.subtitle: LegalBot DZ analyzes your legal questions and guides you with Algerian laws — in French, Arabic, or Darija.

problem.title: Why LegalBot DZ?
problem.item1_desc: Legal texts are difficult to understand without specialized training.
problem.item2_desc: An appointment with a lawyer is a barrier for many citizens.
problem.item3_desc: Waiting weeks for a legal answer can worsen your situation.

how.title: Simple, fast, reliable
how.step1_desc: In French, Arabic or Darija — LegalBot understands all languages.
how.step2_desc: Our agent consults Algerian laws and finds the relevant articles.
how.step3_desc: A clear response with cited legal sources and a liability disclaimer.

cta.title: Ready to understand your rights?
cta.subtitle: Join LegalBot DZ — free to start.

footer.disclaimer: LegalBot DZ provides legal information for informational purposes only. It does not replace a lawyer.
